motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def kthCharacter(self, k: int, operations: List[int]) -> str:
    word = "a"
    result = ""
    for i in range(k):
        if operations[i] == 0:
            result += word
        elif operations[i] == 1:
            result += chr(ord(word[0]) + 1)
        word = result
    return result[k-1]

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(k)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
